creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've got an error while building this port at tinderbox after
	updating QT4 to 4.5.2:
	====================<phase 7: make package>====================
	===>  Building package for qt4-iconengines-4.5.2
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqgif.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqjpeg.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqmng.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqsvg.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqtiff.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqico.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
	pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
	Creating package /tmp/packages/All/qt4-iconengines-4.5.2.tbz
	Registering depends: qt4-svg-4.5.2 qt4-gui-4.5.2 qt4-xml-4.5.2 qt4-corelib-4.5.2 glib-2.20.4 gettext-0.17_1 libiconv-1.13.1 libXrandr-1.3.0 libXcursor-1.1.9_1 libXrender-0.9.4_1 libXinerama-1.0.3,1 libXi-1.2.1,1 libXext-1.0.5,1 libXfixes-4.0.3_1 libXt-1.0.5_1 libX11-1.2.1_1,1 libxcb-1.4 libpthread-stubs-0.1 pcre-7.9 fontconfig-2.6.0,1 freetype2-2.3.9_1 libXau-1.0.4 libXdmcp-1.0.2_1 libSM-1.1.0_1,1 libICE-1.0.4_1,1 xproto-7.0.15 pkg-config-0.23_1 png-1.2.37 perl-5.8.9_3 xcb-proto-1.5 python26-2.6.2_1 expat-2.0.1 fixesproto-4.0 inputproto-1.5.0 kbproto-1.0.3 randrproto-1.3.0 renderproto-0.9.3 xextproto-7.0.5 xineramaproto-1.1.2.
	Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/tmp/packages/All/qt4-iconengines-4.5.2.tbz'
	*** Error code 1
	
	Stop in /a/ports/graphics/qt4-iconengines.
	Deleting qt4-iconengines-4.5.2
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqgif.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqjpeg.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqmng.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqsvg.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqtiff.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/lib/qt4/plugins/imageformats/libqico.so' doesn't exist
	pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
	incorrectly specified?)
	================================================================

Fix: . fix pkg-plist;
	. do not bump PORTREVISION.

	Note: I'm not sure if the %%DEBUG%% line should stay here though.
